label: Transparent sleet pellet motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a cluster of sleet pellets with ice grey, asphalt blue, and white tones, isolated full subject, no text.
Subject: A compact scatter of individual sleet pellets, small rounded translucent ice grains, some half-melted and faceted, with crisp wet highlights and subtle asphalt-blue refraction. The motif should read clearly as sleet pellets from a winter street, not snowflakes, hailstones, or raindrops.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show separated pellets with varied size and careful logistical arrangement like sorted route markers; do not crop any pellet.
Lighting/mood: cold winter street light, careful logistics system mood, crisp visibility, restrained industrial precision.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be uniform with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no snowflake crystals, no falling storm scene, no road background, no cartoon style, no text, no watermark, no decorative background.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Sleet" derived from sleet pellets on a winter street.
Reference motif: small translucent sleet pellets, ice grey, asphalt blue, white, wet granular texture, careful sorted routing pattern, winter street logistics.
Canvas: 3840x2160 style, wide 16:9 board, high resolution, sharp readable labels.
System feel: careful logistics system, dispatch-grade clarity, route planning precision, cold street operations, dense but calm operational UI.
Required visible sections: Morphous Sleet, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance.
UI coverage: buttons with icons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, route status metric cards, logistics timeline, small token charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Visual style: shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product design board; light background in ice grey and white, asphalt blue ink, cold slate borders, wet pellet texture accents, 8px radius, compact grids, precise component states, no decorative card nesting.
Palette names to show: Ice Grey, Asphalt Blue, Sleet White, Wet Curb, Pellet Glass, Signal Cyan, Slush Line, Storm Ink, Sodium Warning.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no brand logos, no watermark, no tiny illegible token tables, no misspelling of "Morphous Sleet".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Sleet". It must feel like the same careful winter-street logistics system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference motif: translucent sleet pellets, ice grey rims, asphalt blue shadows, white pellet highlights, wet granular street texture, careful sorted routing pattern.
Canvas: 3840x2160 style, wide 16:9 board, high resolution, sharp readable labels.
System feel: careful logistics system, night dispatch dashboard, route planning precision, cold street operations, dense but calm operational UI.
Required visible sections: Morphous Sleet, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance.
UI coverage: buttons with icons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, route status metric cards, logistics timeline, small token charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Visual style: shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product design board; asphalt blue and storm ink background, sleet white text, ice grey surfaces, signal cyan focus rings, wet curb borders, pellet-glass highlights, sodium warning only as restrained status color, 8px radius, precise component states.
Palette names to show: Ice Grey, Asphalt Blue, Sleet White, Wet Curb, Pellet Glass, Signal Cyan, Slush Line, Storm Ink, Sodium Warning.
Constraints: no neon overload, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no pure-black-only background, no brand logos, no watermark, no tiny illegible token tables, no misspelling of "Morphous Sleet".
